# datarobot_artifacts (Data Source)

List Workload API artifacts with optional status filter and result limit. Each entry mirrors the full artifact API response, including spec.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "datarobot_artifacts" "all" {
  # Optional filters:
  # status = "locked"
  # limit  = 50
}

output "artifact_count" {
  value = length(data.datarobot_artifacts.all.artifacts)
}

output "artifact_names" {
  value = [for a in data.datarobot_artifacts.all.artifacts : a.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of artifacts to return. When omitted, all matching artifacts are returned (paginated in pages of 100).
- `status` (String) Filter artifacts by status: `draft` or `locked`.

### Read-Only

- `artifacts` (Attributes List) Artifacts matching the filter. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts))

<a id="nestedatt--artifacts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts`

Read-Only:

- `artifact_id` (String) The artifact version ID.
- `artifact_repository_id` (String) ID of the artifact repository for versioning.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp of when the artifact was created.
- `creator` (Attributes) User who created the artifact. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--creator))
- `description` (String) The description of the Artifact.
- `name` (String) The name of the Artifact.
- `permissions` (List of String) Effective repository-level permissions for the authenticated user.
- `spec` (Attributes) The artifact specification containing container group definitions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec))
- `status` (String) Artifact status: `draft` or `locked`.
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with this artifact. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--tags))
- `type` (String) The artifact type: `service` or `nim`.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp of when the artifact was last updated.
- `version` (Number) Version number of the artifact. Set only for locked artifacts.

<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--creator"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.creator`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) User email address.
- `full_name` (String) User's full name.
- `id` (String) User ID.
- `userhash` (String) User's gravatar hash.
- `username` (String) Username.


<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec`

Read-Only:

- `container_groups` (Attributes List) List of container groups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups))
- `storage` (Attributes) NIM model weight storage configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--storage))
- `template_id` (String) ID of the template used to create this NIM artifact.

<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups`

Read-Only:

- `containers` (Attributes List) List of containers in this group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers))
- `name` (String) Name of the container group.

<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers`

Read-Only:

- `build` (Attributes) Server-set image build metadata. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--build))
- `description` (String) Description of the container.
- `entrypoint` (List of String) Container entrypoint.
- `environment_vars` (Attributes List) Environment variables for the container. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--environment_vars))
- `image_build_config` (Attributes) Configuration for server-side image builds from source code. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--image_build_config))
- `image_uri` (String) Docker image URI.
- `liveness_probe` (Attributes) Container liveness check configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--liveness_probe))
- `name` (String) Name of the container.
- `port` (Number) Container access port (1024-65535).
- `primary` (Boolean) Whether this is the primary container.
- `readiness_probe` (Attributes) Container readiness check configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--readiness_probe))
- `security_context` (Attributes) Container security context. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--security_context))
- `startup_probe` (Attributes) Container startup check configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--startup_probe))

<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--build"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers.build`

Read-Only:

- `artifact_image_build_id` (String) Artifact image build ID.
- `created_at` (String) Build creation timestamp (UTC).
- `status` (String) Image build status at submit time.


<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--environment_vars"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers.environment_vars`

Read-Only:

- `dr_credential_id` (String) DataRobot credential ID when source is "dr-credential".
- `key` (String) Key within the credential when source is "dr-credential".
- `name` (String) Name of the environment variable.
- `source` (String) Source type: "string" for plain text values, "dr-credential" for DataRobot credentials.
- `value` (String) Value of the environment variable when source is "string".


<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--image_build_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers.image_build_config`

Read-Only:

- `code_ref` (Attributes) Reference to source code in the DataRobot catalog. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--image_build_config--code_ref))
- `dockerfile` (Attributes) Dockerfile configuration for image builds. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--image_build_config--dockerfile))

<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--image_build_config--code_ref"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers.image_build_config.code_ref`

Read-Only:

- `datarobot` (Attributes) DataRobot catalog reference. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--image_build_config--code_ref--datarobot))
- `provider` (String) Code provider.
- `type` (String) Code reference type.

<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--image_build_config--code_ref--datarobot"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers.image_build_config.code_ref.datarobot`

Read-Only:

- `catalog_id` (String) Catalog ID.
- `catalog_version_id` (String) Catalog version ID.



<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--image_build_config--dockerfile"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers.image_build_config.dockerfile`

Read-Only:

- `entrypoint` (List of String) Entrypoint when source is `generated`.
- `execution_environment_id` (String) Execution environment ID when source is `generated`.
- `execution_environment_version_id` (String) Execution environment version ID when source is `generated`.
- `path` (String) Relative path to the Dockerfile when source is `provided`.
- `source` (String) Dockerfile source: `provided` or `generated`.



<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--liveness_probe"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers.liveness_probe`

Read-Only:

- `failure_threshold` (Number) Minimum consecutive failures for the probe to be considered failed.
- `host` (String) Host name to connect to, defaults to the pod IP.
- `initial_delay_seconds` (Number) Number of seconds to wait before the first probe is executed.
- `path` (String) URL path to query for health check.
- `period_seconds` (Number) How often (in seconds) to perform the probe.
- `port` (Number) Port number to access on the container.
- `scheme` (String) Scheme to use for connecting to the host (HTTP or HTTPS).
- `timeout_seconds` (Number) Number of seconds after which the probe times out.


<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--readiness_probe"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers.readiness_probe`

Read-Only:

- `failure_threshold` (Number) Minimum consecutive failures for the probe to be considered failed.
- `host` (String) Host name to connect to, defaults to the pod IP.
- `initial_delay_seconds` (Number) Number of seconds to wait before the first probe is executed.
- `path` (String) URL path to query for health check.
- `period_seconds` (Number) How often (in seconds) to perform the probe.
- `port` (Number) Port number to access on the container.
- `scheme` (String) Scheme to use for connecting to the host (HTTP or HTTPS).
- `timeout_seconds` (Number) Number of seconds after which the probe times out.


<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--security_context"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers.security_context`

Read-Only:

- `allow_privilege_escalation` (Boolean) Whether a process can gain more privileges than its parent.
- `capabilities` (Attributes) Linux capabilities to add or drop. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--security_context--capabilities))
- `read_only_root_filesystem` (Boolean) Whether the root filesystem is read-only.
- `seccomp_profile` (Attributes) Seccomp profile for the container. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--security_context--seccomp_profile))

<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--security_context--capabilities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers.security_context.capabilities`

Read-Only:

- `add` (List of String) Capabilities to add.
- `drop` (List of String) Capabilities to drop.


<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--security_context--seccomp_profile"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers.security_context.seccomp_profile`

Read-Only:

- `localhost_profile` (String) Path to a seccomp profile on the node when type is Localhost.
- `type` (String) Seccomp profile type.



<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--container_groups--containers--startup_probe"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.container_groups.containers.startup_probe`

Read-Only:

- `failure_threshold` (Number) Minimum consecutive failures for the probe to be considered failed.
- `host` (String) Host name to connect to, defaults to the pod IP.
- `initial_delay_seconds` (Number) Number of seconds to wait before the first probe is executed.
- `path` (String) URL path to query for health check.
- `period_seconds` (Number) How often (in seconds) to perform the probe.
- `port` (Number) Port number to access on the container.
- `scheme` (String) Scheme to use for connecting to the host (HTTP or HTTPS).
- `timeout_seconds` (Number) Number of seconds after which the probe times out.




<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--spec--storage"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.spec.storage`

Read-Only:

- `mode` (String) Storage mode: `dedicatedPvc` or `nimCache`.
- `pvc_size` (String) PVC size for dedicated storage (e.g. `150Gi`).



<a id="nestedatt--artifacts--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `artifacts.tags`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Tag ID.
- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `value` (String) Tag value.
